n: Chapter 7: Lothrandir of the Frozen Wastes

steps.t: Lothrandir is at Sûri-kylä, the major village of the Lossoth in Forochel. Calenglad has sent you to bring your message to Lothrandir, in Forochel, wit…
Lothrandir is at Sûri-kylä, in Forochel. You have found the cause of the Lossoth's hunting troubles and have hopefully ended it. Lothrandir, at least,…
